name: earnings-reviewer
description: Earnings call and filings to model update to note draft.

workflow.name: ingest_transcript
workflow.action: Pull earnings call transcript and supplemental filings.

workflow.name: analyze_results
workflow.action: Variance analysis vs consensus and prior period.

workflow.name: update_model
workflow.action: Roll forward estimates reflecting reported results.

workflow.name: draft_note
workflow.action: Write earnings note with rating, PT, and key takeaways.
